inlineContent.text: This protocol will be removed in 10.0. Use
This protocol can be implemented by any classes that can
generate keyboard layouts in various ways.

abstract.text: This type defines the full set of keys on a keyboard and
is also a namespace for layout-related types.
Try to register a localized layout service.
KeyboardKit helps you create fully customizable keyboard extensions, using Swift and SwiftUI.
Get a keyboard layout for the provided context.
